settingsCard.title: Data migration (dental-bridge)
settingsCard.description: Import a DPMF file produced by dental-bridge (patients, appointments, budgets, payments, documents).

page.title: Data migration
page.subtitle: Import data extracted by dental-bridge into this clinic.

upload.dropFile: Drop the .dpm file here, or click to choose one

preview.title: Preview
preview.verifactuHelp: Preserves legal hashes (Verifactu) on invoices. Only available when the Verifactu module is installed and the file contains that data.
preview.warning: This action cannot be undone. Review the data before confirming.

filters.title: Professional filtering
filters.description: Filtered staff are imported as inactive (kept for historical references but hidden from the agenda). You can reactivate them later in Settings → Users.
filters.minActivityHelp: Soft-deactivate professionals with no clinical trace newer than this many months. Set 0 to disable.
filters.excludeOrphans: Exclude agenda-only columns without a real collaborator record
filters.excludeInactive: Exclude professionals marked as inactive in the source
filters.excludeNonClinical: Import only dentists and hygienists (skip auxiliaries and admin staff)

proposals.title: Review catalog mappings
proposals.subtitle: Link each Gesdén treatment to the DentalPin catalog before importing.
